name: Forest Clearing
description: A modest clearing where the tree cover thins enough to see the sky. To the west, a narrow trail leads back toward a canvas tent. To the east, the forest thickens into something older and darker.
ambient: Wind moves through the tall grass at the clearing's edge.
The trees to the east seem unnaturally still.

interaction_rules.text: You close your eyes and murmur a quiet prayer. For a heartbeat, the room feels still enough to listen.
Your voice drifts through the area and fades into the distance. No one applauds, but it lifts your spirits.
